basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate - II posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.S. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience
qualification.details: Project Associate - II: M.Tech./M.S. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience. (Note: The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications should be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th).

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Project Associate - II: M.Tech./M.S. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc/Professional qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience. (Note: The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications should be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards, and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate - II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate - II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - II position at IIT Gandhinagar is 20th July 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a M.Tech./M.S. or equivalent in an appropriate discipline, or a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc/Professional qualification with at least 02 years of post-qualification experience. Specific percentage criteria apply from graduation onwards.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - II role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 78,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - II position at IIT Gandhinagar through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate - II recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate - II at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Project Associate - II at IIT Gandhinagar is CON/13089/Advt0269.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific age relaxation policies.
